context:
From: Martin Cho <m.cho@northbridge.example>
To: Priya Nair <p.nair@northbridge.example>
Subject: Thursday client meeting

Hi Priya,

The client has asked to move Thursday's meeting from 10:00 a.m. to 2:30 p.m. Their finance director will be arriving in the city later than expected. Conference Room B is already booked in the afternoon, so I reserved the smaller room on the fourth floor. It seats eight people, which should be enough if only the project leads attend.

Could you update the calendar invitation and send me the revised cost forecast before noon on Thursday? I would like to print copies before the meeting.

Thanks,
Martin

items.prompt: Why did Martin write the email?
options: To describe changes to a meeting
To request a larger conference room
To announce a new finance director
items.explanation: Le message explique le nouvel horaire, la nouvelle salle et les actions à effectuer.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

options: A room was unavailable in the morning
The client's finance director will arrive late
items.explanation: Le finance director arrivera plus tard que prévu.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

items.prompt: Where will the meeting probably take place?
items.explanation: Martin a réservé la petite salle du quatrième étage.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

items.prompt: What is implied about the meeting?
options: More than eight people must attend
Only senior project members may attend
items.explanation: La salle de huit places suffit si seuls les project leads participent.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

items.prompt: What is Priya asked to send?
items.explanation: Martin demande le revised cost forecast avant midi.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

context:
GREENWAY MARKET — CUSTOMER NOTICE

Our Central Avenue store will close at 6:00 p.m. on Sunday, November 9, two hours earlier than usual, while the refrigeration system is inspected. Frozen and refrigerated products will not be available after 4:30 p.m. that day.

The bakery, pharmacy, and customer service desk will operate normally until closing. Online orders scheduled for Sunday evening will be prepared at our Hill Road location and delivered at the original time.

We apologize for the inconvenience. Regular opening hours will resume on Monday.

items.prompt: What is the purpose of the notice?
items.explanation: Le document informe les clients d'une fermeture anticipée et de restrictions temporaires.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

items.prompt: At what time will the store close on November 9?
items.explanation: La fermeture est annoncée à 18 h.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

items.explanation: Les produits réfrigérés et surgelés ne seront plus disponibles après 16 h 30.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

items.prompt: What can be inferred about Sunday evening online orders?
options: They must be collected at Central Avenue
They will include no frozen goods
items.explanation: Les commandes seront préparées ailleurs mais livrées à l'heure initiale.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

items.explanation: Le texte indique Monday.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

context:
OPERATIONS COORDINATOR

Marston Events is seeking an organized Operations Coordinator for its Lyon office. The successful candidate will schedule suppliers, maintain event budgets, and communicate with venues. Applicants should have at least two years of administrative experience and be comfortable using spreadsheet software.

The position is full-time and includes occasional evening work during major events. Fluency in English is required; knowledge of Spanish is an advantage but not essential. Applications must include a résumé and a short cover letter and be submitted by September 22.

Interviews will take place during the first week of October.

items.explanation: Il s'agit d'une offre d'emploi à temps plein.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

items.explanation: Scheduling suppliers fait partie des missions.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

items.explanation: L'annonce exige au moins deux ans d'expérience administrative.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

options: It will be tested before applying
items.explanation: Spanish est présenté comme un avantage non essentiel.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

items.explanation: Les entretiens auront lieu pendant la première semaine d'octobre.
items.trap: Appuie-toi uniquement sur les informations du document et distingue les faits des suppositions.

context:
Order Confirmation — BrightDesk Supplies

Order number: BD-48172
Order date: March 3
Customer: Atelier Verne
Delivery address: 18 rue des Tilleuls, Grenoble

Items:
- 4 ErgoLine office chairs — €720
- 2 adjustable monitor stands — €118
- Delivery — €35

Subtotal: €873
Discount: €43.65
Total charged: €829.35

Estimated delivery: March 8, between 9:00 a.m. and 1:00 p.m.

Someone must be present to sign for the chairs. To change the delivery date, contact us no later than March 6 at 5:00 p.m.

items.prompt: How much was charged to the customer?
items.explanation: Le total charged est de 829,35 €.
